========================================================
   INSTANT TRANSLATOR
   User Guide
========================================================

This program instantly translates any text you select anywhere on your
computer, with a single keyboard shortcut. No need to open a browser or
copy-paste into a translation website.

You do NOT need to install Python or anything else on your computer.


--------------------------------------------------------
1) HOW TO START
--------------------------------------------------------

- Double-click "InstantTranslator.exe".
- The first launch may take a few seconds; please be patient.
- Once started, a blue icon appears in the system tray (bottom-right
  corner, next to the clock).
  * If you can't see the icon, click the up-arrow ( ^ ) there; it may
    be among the hidden icons.
- You will see a short notification like "Running. Shortcut: ctrl+shift+t".
  You are ready!

Note: On startup the program picks its interface language automatically
based on your Windows language (Turkish or English). You can change this
in Settings.


--------------------------------------------------------
2) HOW TO USE
--------------------------------------------------------

  1. In any program (Word, browser, PDF, etc.), SELECT the text you
     want to translate with your mouse.

  2. Press the shortcut (default):   Ctrl + Shift + T

  3. The translation appears instantly in a small window on the
     RIGHT-CENTER of your screen.

  4. To close it, use any of these three ways:
       - Click OUTSIDE the window (anywhere else), or
       - Press the  Esc  key, or
       - Click the  X  button at the top-right of the window.

Extra features:
  - DRAGGING: Grab the window by any empty area and drag it anywhere
    on the screen you like.
  - COPY: The "Copy" button in the window puts the translation on your
    clipboard.


--------------------------------------------------------
3) SETTINGS (shortcut, languages, theme, interface language)
--------------------------------------------------------

You can open Settings in three ways:

  A) Click the GEAR (Settings) icon at the top-right of the translation
     window.
  B) Right-click the blue tray icon and choose "Settings" (or
     double-click the icon).
  C) From the tray menu, use "Open settings file (Notepad)".

In the Settings window you can change:
  - Shortcut          : CLICK the box once, then press your desired key
                        combination (e.g. hold Ctrl+Shift, then press T).
                        The combination is written automatically.
                        NOTE: Keys pressed WITHOUT clicking the box first
                        will NOT change the shortcut; you must click the
                        box first.
  - Source language   : Language of the text to translate (default:
                        Auto Detect).
  - Target language   : Language to translate into (default: Turkish).
  - Theme             : Dark or Light look for the Settings window.
  - Interface language: Language of menus and messages
                        (System / English / Turkish).

When you click "Save", the settings apply instantly and are remembered.


--------------------------------------------------------
4) CLOSING THE PROGRAM
--------------------------------------------------------

- Right-click the tray icon -> "Quit".
- Only one copy runs at a time; if you try to open a second one, it
  warns you that it is "already running".


--------------------------------------------------------
5) COMMON SITUATIONS
--------------------------------------------------------

* "Windows protected your PC" / SmartScreen warning:
  The program is safe, but because it is not digitally signed, Windows
  may say it doesn't recognize it. Click "More info" -> "Run anyway".

* If your antivirus warns you:
  The program watches the keyboard so it can detect the shortcut key;
  some antivirus tools mistakenly flag this. If you trust it, add it to
  your exceptions list.

* If nothing happens when you press the shortcut:
  - Make sure you have actually SELECTED some text first.
  - You need an internet connection (translation requires the internet).
  - For some programs that "run as administrator", you may need to run
    InstantTranslator.exe as administrator too (right-click -> "Run as
    administrator") for the shortcut to work inside them.

* "Cannot reach the translation engine" (red text):
  Check your internet connection and try again. The program waits at
  most 5 seconds and never freezes.


--------------------------------------------------------
6) START AUTOMATICALLY WITH WINDOWS (optional)
--------------------------------------------------------

  1. Press  Windows key + R  on your keyboard.
  2. Type  shell:startup  and press Enter.
  3. In the folder that opens, place a SHORTCUT to InstantTranslator.exe
     (right-click the file -> Create shortcut; then move the created
     shortcut into this folder).

  From now on, the program starts automatically in the background every
  time your computer boots.

========================================================
Enjoy!
========================================================
